segments.text: Make an altar of shittim wood, five cubits long, and five cubits broad; the altar shall be foursquare: and the height thereof shall be three cubits.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make the horns of it upon the four corners thereof: his horns shall be of the same: and overlay it with brass.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make his pans to receive his ashes, and his shovels, and his basons, and his fleshhooks, and his firepans: all the vessels thereof thou shalt make of brass.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make for it a grate of network of brass; and upon the net shalt thou make four brasen rings in the four corners thereof.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put it under the compass of the altar beneath, that the net may be even to the midst of the altar.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make staves for the altar, staves of shittim wood, and overlay them with brass.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The staves shall be put into the rings, and the staves shall be upon the two sides of the altar, to bear it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hollow with boards shalt thou make it: as it was shewed thee in the mount, so shall they make it.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: it was shewed: Heb. he shewed

segments.text: Make the court of the tabernacle: for the south side southward there shall be hangings for the court of fine twined linen of an hundred cubits long for one side:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The twenty pillars thereof and their twenty sockets shall be of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets shall be of silver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Likewise for the north side in length there shall be hangings of an hundred cubits long, and his twenty pillars and their twenty sockets of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the breadth of the court on the west side shall be hangings of fifty cubits: their pillars ten, and their sockets ten.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The breadth of the court on the east side eastward shall be fifty cubits.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The hangings of one side of the gate shall be fifteen cubits: their pillars three, and their sockets three.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: On the other side shall be hangings fifteen cubits: their pillars three, and their sockets three.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the gate of the court shall be an hanging of twenty cubits, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, wrought with needlework: and their pillars shall be four, and their sockets four.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the pillars round about the court shall be filleted with silver; their hooks shall be of silver, and their sockets of brass.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The length of the court shall be an hundred cubits, and the breadth fifty every where, and the height five cubits of fine twined linen, and their sockets of brass.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the vessels of the tabernacle in all the service thereof, and all the pins thereof, and all the pins of the court, shall be of brass.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Command the children of Israel, that they bring thee pure oil olive beaten for the light, to cause the lamp to burn always.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: to burn: Heb. to ascend up
heading: Oil for the Lamp

segments.text: In the tabernacle of the congregation without the vail, which is before the testimony, Aaron and his sons shall order it from evening to morning before the LORD: it shall be a statute for ever unto their generations on the behalf of the children of Israel.
segments.speaker: God
